ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the object */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the object's information was last modified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the object data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_categories" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the object-category mapping */,
  "classification_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the classification */,
  "classification_algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the characteristic */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the characteristic's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_characteristics" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic for the object */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the characteristic value */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the characteristic value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id", "characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, machine learning engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, classification) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being classified */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the object */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was performed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the classification */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for the classification */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the classification result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last trained */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was calculated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metrics were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "metric_name", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_info" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_product" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the recommendation is assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was calculated */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metrics were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_name", "date")
)
